Manta Ray Critical Notice - March 2026 Outage Complete


Notice Text:

The work on Manta Ray at Ship Shoal 332 and Ship Shoal 207 has been completed. Effective immediately, all capacity restrictions are lifted and shippers may resume normal operations. Unless given permission, shippers must still ensure that actual produced volumes align with scheduled quantities.

For Ewing Bank 910, production may resume once Enbridge is able to get out to the platform and remove the lockout which we expect to be this evening or tomorrow morning.

For questions concerning this notice, please contact your Offshore Account Representative at 713-627-6204.


BackPrint
